extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked with 19km remaining on Villa d'Adda, dropped MAS on the descent, then outsprint him at San Fermo della Battaglia
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked at 19km on Villa d'Adda climb, not summit, forcing MAS to chase alone on descent
HARPER Chris (Jumbo-Visma) paced VINGEGAARD on Madonna del Ghisallo despite leaving team—unusual loyalty signal for outgoing domestique
MAS Enric multiple attacks failed to drop POGAČAR, revealing sprint speed deficit matters even after 250km mountains
LANDA Mikel hung 10-15 seconds back rather than bridging, playing podium safety over collaboration against POGAČAR

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: won despite MAS attacking him multiple times, showing both climbing resilience and sprint superiority after 253km
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: transformed rider in final weeks, three monument podiums (5th, 4th, 1st) suggests peaking pattern worth monitoring
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: first monument podium after controlling gap rather than chasing, tactical maturity over aggression paid off
rider_signals.HARPER Chris: positive: man-of-match domestique performance for VINGEGAARD despite leaving Jumbo-Visma, indicates professionalism under contract limbo
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: sixth in final race maintaining 10-year top-10 monument record, baseline quality held even in retirement race
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: positive: attacked with HIGUITA for top-5 in final 8km, aggressive racing from young rider in monument debut
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: late attack with RODRÍGUEZ showed residual form after supporting, willing to race own result late
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: strong ride with HARPER pacing but no podium challenge, monuments require different skillset than stage racing
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped on Villa d'Adda in retirement race, confirms monument-winning form completely gone
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: one of first dropped riders on Villa d'Adda, concerning form collapse for former monument specialist
